message:
feat: add non-blocking SDK API and npm bundling for packages

SDK:
- Add openAsync() for non-blocking viewer
- Add evalJS() to execute JS in browser
- Add onMessage() for IPC from browser
- Add close(), isOpen(), onClose() for viewer control
- Add __TERMWEB_IPC__ protocol for browser-to-Node communication

Packages:
- Use esbuild to bundle npm dependencies
- Dashboard: real-time metrics via IPC, filter macOS system volumes
- Remove CDN dependencies, use local bundles

+    disk: disk
+      // Filter out macOS system volumes and invalid entries
+      .filter(d => {
+        // Skip if size is invalid
+        if (!d.size || isNaN(d.size) || d.size <= 0) return false;
+        // Skip macOS system volumes
+        if (d.mount.startsWith('/System/Volumes/')) return false;
+        // Skip snapshot/private volumes
+        if (d.mount.includes('/private/var/folders/')) return false;
+        // Skip tiny volumes (< 1GB)
+        if (d.size < 1024 * 1024 * 1024) return false;
+        return true;
+      })
+      .map(d => ({
+        fs: d.fs,
+        mount: d.mount,
+        type: d.type,
+        size: d.size,
+        used: d.used,
+        available: d.available,
+        usePercent: d.use
+      })),
